subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! How many the men who, throughout the centuries and ages, expectantly awaited the promised Manifestation...
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی چه بسیار از رجال که در قرون و اعصار منتظر ظهور بودند
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment
